mapper.select:
SELECT id, spec_eqp_ct_code, spec_eqp_ct_name, spec_eqp_ct_area, spec_eqp_ct_model, spec_eqp_ct_type, spec_eqp_ct_lifting_capacity, spec_eqp_ct_lifting_height, spec_eqp_ct_span, spec_eqp_ct_design_pressure, spec_eqp_ct_manufacturer, spec_eqp_ct_factory_no, spec_eqp_ct_produce_date, spec_eqp_ct_install_company, spec_eqp_ct_install_date, spec_eqp_ct_acceptance_date, spec_eqp_ct_usage_date, spec_eqp_ct_license_no, spec_eqp_ct_status, spec_eqp_ct_last_inspect_date, spec_eqp_ct_next_inspect_date, spec_eqp_ct_inspect_company, spec_eqp_ct_maintain_responsible, spec_eqp_ct_maintain_record, spec_eqp_ct_accident_record, spec_eqp_ct_create_time, spec_eqp_ct_update_time, spec_eqp_ct_factory, spec_eqp_ct_backup1, spec_eqp_ct_backup2, spec_eqp_ct_backup3 FROM spec_eqp_crane_trans_account
and spec_eqp_ct_name like CONCAT( #{queryParams.specEqpCtName}, '%')
and spec_eqp_ct_type = #{queryParams.specEqpCtType}
and spec_eqp_ct_status like CONCAT ('%',#{queryParams.specEqpCtStatus}, '%')

SELECT id, spec_eqp_ct_code, spec_eqp_ct_name, spec_eqp_ct_area, spec_eqp_ct_model, spec_eqp_ct_type, spec_eqp_ct_lifting_capacity, spec_eqp_ct_lifting_height, spec_eqp_ct_span, spec_eqp_ct_design_pressure, spec_eqp_ct_manufacturer, spec_eqp_ct_factory_no, spec_eqp_ct_produce_date, spec_eqp_ct_install_company, spec_eqp_ct_install_date, spec_eqp_ct_acceptance_date, spec_eqp_ct_usage_date, spec_eqp_ct_license_no, spec_eqp_ct_status, spec_eqp_ct_last_inspect_date, spec_eqp_ct_next_inspect_date, spec_eqp_ct_inspect_company, spec_eqp_ct_maintain_responsible, spec_eqp_ct_maintain_record, spec_eqp_ct_accident_record, spec_eqp_ct_create_time, spec_eqp_ct_update_time, spec_eqp_ct_factory, spec_eqp_ct_backup1, spec_eqp_ct_backup2, spec_eqp_ct_backup3 FROM spec_eqp_crane_trans_account
and spec_eqp_ct_name like CONCAT( #{specEqpCtName}, '%')
and spec_eqp_ct_type = #{specEqpCtType}
and spec_eqp_ct_status like CONCAT ('%',#{specEqpCtStatus}, '%')
